name: March of the Honoured Dead
community_notes: Applies to friendly Custodes Walker units; ARMOURY build restriction not modeled.

name: Flawless Construction (Moritoi)
community_notes: Incoming attacks with S greater than this unit's T suffer -1 to Wound (this phase).

name: Skin-Crawling Disorientation
community_notes: Ability-grants only; act-after-advance + Ceaseless Vigilance null/detection not modeled in buff layer.

name: Encircling Hunter
community_notes: Pre-battle redeploy into Strategic Reserves; not modeled in buff layer.

name: Psyk-Out Grenades Upgrade
community_notes: Grants EXPLOSIVES; stratagem-conditional psyker re-roll not modeled.

name: Synchronised Inferno
community_notes: Targeted unit's [TORRENT] ranged attacks gain [BLAST 1] this phase.

name: The Hammer Falls
community_notes: Terminator units that made an ingress move this turn re-roll Charge rolls; LIONS build restriction not modeled.

name: Fierce Conqueror
community_notes: Bearer melee Attacks +2 per 5 enemy models within 6" (start of Fight phase).

name: Flawless Construction (Solar Spearhead)
community_notes: Incoming attacks with S greater than this unit's T suffer -1 to Wound (this phase).
